message:
test(doom/renderer): add 22 tests for BSP renderer, clipping, and sector lookup (bd-19s5x)

Cover: clip_near_plane edge cases (both behind, at near, symmetric, large values),
lerp_u8 boundaries (0/255, midpoint truncation), get_seg_front/back_sector
(direction flip, missing/OOB sidedef), render with simple room map (stats,
framebuffer writes, background fill, reset between frames), resize behavior
(column clips, projection scaling), sky ceiling detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
